docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MORA, MIRIAM AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. "PLAINTIFF GIVES JUDGMENT CREDITOR $962.00 IN COMPLETE SATISFACTION OF DEFENDANT'S JUDGMENT AGAINST PLAINTIFF ENTERED ON MAY 30, 2014. PLAINTIFF RETAINS $543.00 IN SATISFACTION OF HER CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT FOR HER SECURITY DEPOSIT ($500) PLUS INTEREST ($43.00). DEFENDANT TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED MAY-01-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, JOSE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, MIRIAM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
